findings.summary: TimelineScrubber component created with turn segments, drag handle, hover tooltip, position indicator
message-timeline evolved with Fork button on TurnDivider, agent colored left border on AssistantPart, Checkpoint row rendering, scrubber integration
message-timeline.data.ts extended with Checkpoint tagged class in TimelineRow namespace
session-viz context extended with AgentHeartbeatInfo type, heartbeat tracking in step/tool handlers, getAgentColor helper
ActivityFeed enhanced with agent heartbeat badge, AGENT_COLORS mapping, agent switching animation, color-coded agent badges
VizPanel enhanced with mini turn indicator showing colored dots for recent session turns
